name: claude-code-harness
description: Public supported Grok adapter for Claude Code Harness Plan, Work, Review, and Release workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Public supported Harness workflow adapter for Grok
interface.longDescription: Use Claude Code Harness skills in Grok for evidence-backed planning, implementation, review, release, setup, sync, and team execution workflows. Grok is supported after H1–H8 verified on the Grok claim path (live H4 2026-07-17 + H7 release-preflight fail-closed gate); Claude-envelope PreToolUse floor — not full Claude hook parity.
defaultPrompt: Use harness-plan to plan this change.
Use harness-work to execute the next Plans.md task.
